contract_scope: Human-readable descriptor for an MCP-backed tool. Used by POST /api/tools/discover (#S-9) and POST /api/tools/pick (#S-10) to rank tools by semantic / hybrid / keyword match and return the top mcp_target for invocation. Embeddings live in tool_embeddings (svec-sibling table, keyed tvec-{hex}).
honesty_rules: Each tool is uniquely identified by tool_id. One descriptor per tool_id.
mcp_target is the durable transport-level address used by the caller to invoke the tool through king_mcp_request(); it is returned verbatim in pick/discover results.
The descriptor is the ONLY signal used for semantic ranking. name + description + capabilities[] + tags[] are concatenated into the embedding input. input_schema_ref is metadata only — not embedded.
Descriptor storage is demo-scale brute-force cosine. No ANN. No tool-specific access control beyond what king_mcp_request already enforces.
POST /api/tools/pick fails closed with rejection code `no_semantic_match` when no tool scores above min_score. It never returns an arbitrary default target.

rejection_codes.invalid_tool_descriptor: any required field missing, out of range, or of the wrong type; unknown top-level keys
